mapper.sql: id AS "id", tenant_id AS "tenantId", project_id AS "projectId", client_code AS "clientCode", brand_code AS "brandCode", service_product_code AS "serviceProductCode", external_order_code AS "externalOrderCode", status AS "status", configuration_bundle_id AS "configurationBundleId", configuration_bundle_code AS "configurationBundleCode", configuration_bundle_version AS "configurationBundleVersion", configuration_bundle_digest AS "configurationBundleDigest", province_code AS "provinceCode", city_code AS "cityCode", district_code AS "districtCode", external_dispatched_at AS "externalDispatchedAt", received_at AS "receivedAt", activated_at AS "activatedAt", fulfilled_at AS "fulfilledAt", version AS "version"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM wo_work_order WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{workOrderId}
